form.formComment: Jamie Bayliss trained four-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Dam was a winner of one race. Recent trial winner at Sunshine Coast Inner Track. Makes debut on home track and can get off the mark at first outing despite an awkward gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Jamie Bayliss trained four-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Dam was a winner of one race. Recent trial winner at Sunshine Coast Inner Track. Makes debut on home track and can get off the mark at first outing despite an awkward gate.

form.formComment: Having third race start. When well in the market at debut, tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Doomben Mdn on March 11 over 1110m, slow going 0.7 len behind Sky Dweller with 60kg at $4.40. Second-up sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 13 at this track Mdn on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Naturally Lit with 60kg at $2.35. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Having third race start. Second-up sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 13 at this track Mdn on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Naturally Lit with 60kg at $2.35. Forward showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide. Laid out rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Having third race start. When well in the market at debut, raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 7 at Doomben Cg&E Mdn-Sw on February 25 over 1200m, 6 len behind Black Assassin carrying 58kg at $4.40. Last start 8th of 11 at Ipswich Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Raging carrying 58.5kg at $13. Well placed and expected to feature.

form.formComment: First start. By leading sire Maurice out of Teaspoon. Half-brother to five-time winner Demitasse. Dam was a Group 3 winner and Group 2 placed. Purchased for AUD $120,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Gold Coast Yearling Sale). Was third in a Deagon barrier trial over 1050m on November 20. Following that seventh over 840m in a Doomben trial on March 17. Was out of the placings at Doomben at his most recent trial. Monitor market moves.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First start. By leading sire Maurice out of Teaspoon. Half-brother to five-time winner Demitasse. Dam was a Group 3 winner and Group 2 placed. Purchased for AUD $120,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Gold Coast Yearling Sale). Was third in a Deagon barrier trial over 1050m on November 20. Following that seventh over 840m in a Doomben trial on March 17. Was out of the placings at Doomben at his most recent trial. Monitor market moves.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Astern - Ponte Roma). Half-brother to seven-time winner and Group 2 placed Party For Two. Dam was a winner of two races. Has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Fifth at Doomben in a 840m trial on March 17. Respect any push in betting.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding (Astern - Ponte Roma). Half-brother to seven-time winner and Group 2 placed Party For Two. Dam was a winner of two races. Has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Fifth at Doomben in a 840m trial on March 17. Respect any push in betting.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at Gold Coast Poly Bm55 November 4 over 1050m, 12 len behind Fast Fusion with 57.5kg at $61. On debut ran last of 8 at Murwillumbah Mdn October 14 over 1200m, 7 len behind Hostile La Vista with 57.5kg at $13. Still hard to have until he displays some improvement.

On debut ran last of 8 at Murwillumbah Mdn October 14 over 1200m, 7 len behind Hostile La Vista with 57.5kg at $13. Still hard to have until he displays some improvement.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Travelled keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 11 at Sale Mdn-Sw October 8 over 1427m, 3.5 len behind Blue Cowboy with 57.5kg at $5.50. When resuming last campaign seventh of 11 at Benalla Mdn-Sw September 2 over 1212m, soft track; 8 len behind The Narrator with 57.5kg at $7.50. Capable of a bold return.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 900m, steadied lost ground when tightened for room by Bold Amore.

form.formComment: Half-sister to Group 3 winner and Group 1 placed Outrageous. Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 11 at this track 3yo F Mdn-Sw on September 28 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Do What I Say with 58kg at $3. Everything points to a positive return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Half-sister to Group 3 winner and Group 1 placed Outrageous. Resuming from a lengthy break. Everything points to a positive return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly when placed under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Resuming after eight months break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at this track Mdn August 17 over 1000m, soft track; 6 len behind Hannabana carrying 55kg at $21. On debut fifth of 10 at Gatton Mdn-Sw August 1 over 860m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Jimmyinthejungle carrying 51kg at $8.50. Might be better off following this run.
